summary: File Upload Feature Testing Complete. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified for all 3 roles (athlete, coach, director). File upload, download, and message attachments working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: File upload implementation uses Emergent Object Storage correctly
Proper validation for file size (10MB max) and content types
AttachmentBubble component renders correctly with download functionality
data-testid attributes properly added for all interactive elements
seed_data_creation: Test messages with attachments created during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: File Upload Feature testing complete (iteration 238). Backend tests verified: (1) POST /api/files/upload - image, PDF, text, CSV uploads all working, (2) GET /api/files/{file_id}/download - file download working, (3) POST /api/support-messages/{thread_id}/reply with attachments - working, (4) Upload validation - rejects files >10MB and disallowed content types, (5) Auth required for upload/download. Frontend verified: Athlete, Coach, Director all have paperclip/attach button in reply area (data-testid='attach-file-btn'), file input (data-testid='file-input'), reply input (data-testid='thread-reply-input'), send button (data-testid='thread-reply-send'). AttachmentBubble components render correctly with file icon, filename, size, and download on click. Full upload flow tested: select file -> preview shows -> type message -> send -> attachment appears in thread.

backend_file_download.GET /api/files/{file_id}/download: PASS - downloads file with correct content

backend_message_attachments.Verify attachment in thread: PASS - attachment appears in thread messages
